options.C: The total cost of video games and snacks
options.D: The number of video games and snacks
options.E: The time spent playing video games

A bookshelf has 5 shelves, and each shelf can hold at most 8 books. The inequality $5s \leq 40$ represents

options.A: The number of books on each shelf
options.B: The total number of books on all shelves

questions.question: Graph the system of linear inequalities: $x + 2y \geq 4$ and $3x - 2y \leq 6$. Shade the solution region.

A bakery sells a total of 250 loaves of bread per day. The inequality $3b + 2c \leq 250$ represents the number of whole wheat bread loaves (b) and white bread loaves (c) sold. Graph the inequality and find the solution region.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Ensure students understand the difference between solid and dashed boundary lines.
Tip 2: Remind students to shade the solution region carefully.
Tip 3: Encourage students to check their work by plugging in test points.
